overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character in a white coat exiting an indoor facility into a neon-lit industrial alleyway. The scene transitions from a red-walled interior room with metal shelving to an outdoor corridor with large pipes and glowing signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial break room with red walls and metal storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the room toward the exit doorway, passing by shelves and tables

notable_agents.action: sitting at white table looking at a handheld device
standing near metal shelving with arms crossed

entered.detail: tall metal storage racks with various containers and supplies
rectangular white table with simple chairs
curved metallic counter with glowing blue accent lighting
open doorway leading to brightly lit exterior with yellow door frame
long rectangular overhead light fixtures on dark ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an interior break room with red walls and industrial metal shelving. A person sits at a white table to the right while another stands near storage units on the left. The character walks steadily toward a brightly lit exit doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk industrial alley with neon signage

events.description: character exits the indoor facility through the doorway into an industrial alleyway
lighting shifts from warm artificial indoor to cool neon outdoor with pink and purple hues

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, observing the industrial surroundings and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: leaning casually against the wall near large pipes
group of pedestrians walking toward the camera through the alley

entered.detail: large vertical and horizontal metal pipes running along the wall
large rectangular metal box with ventilation grates
glowing white neon sign reading 'STREET ACRES' on red wall
complex mechanical equipment with cables and conduits
elevated metal bridge connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the facility into a narrow industrial alley illuminated by vibrant neon lights. Large pipes run along the left wall while a glowing 'STREET ACRES' sign marks the right wall. Several pedestrians populate the corridor, including one leaning against the wall and others walking toward the camera from the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, red-walled interior facility into a vibrant, neon-lit industrial alleyway. It begins inside a break room, moving past industrial metal shelving and people gathered around a white table as the character walks toward a brightly lit exit. As the character passes through the doorway, the enclosed red space opens into a narrow outdoor corridor defined by a shift to cool, electric lighting. The scene then expands to reveal large pipes lining the left wall and a glowing STREET ACRES sign on the right, while pedestrians populate the alleyway ahead.
